welcome.title: Welcome to BigMCP
welcome.subtitle: Your unified gateway to connect, manage, and orchestrate all your MCP servers in one place. Let's get you set up!

feature1.title: Connect Services
feature1.body: Connect to hundreds of MCP servers with a few clicks

feature2.title: AI Workflows
feature2.body: Create powerful workflows using natural language

feature3.title: Secure & Private
feature3.body: Your credentials are encrypted and never shared

chooseServers.title: Choose Your Services
chooseServers.subtitle: Select the services you use. You can always add more later from the marketplace.

connect.subtitleConnecting: We are connecting to your selected services. This may take a moment.
connect.subtitleResults: Here is the status of your service connections.
connect.noteCredentials: Some servers require credentials to be configured. You can set them up from the {{services}} page after completing onboarding.

complete.bodyNeedsCreds: Some services need credentials to work. Head to {{services}} to configure them, then start creating AI-powered workflows.
complete.bodyConnected: Your services are connected! Start exploring the marketplace to discover more services and create your first AI-powered workflow.
complete.bodyWelcome: Welcome to BigMCP. Start exploring the marketplace to discover services and create your first AI-powered workflow.

landing.title: BigMCP — One endpoint for all your MCP servers
landing.description: Self-host an autonomous MCP gateway. Bring your own LLM, run fully offline, keep every byte on your infrastructure. AGPLv3, no vendor lock-in.

signup.title: Try BigMCP — Sign up
signup.description: Create your BigMCP account to connect, manage and orchestrate all your MCP servers from a single endpoint.

login.title: Sign in to BigMCP
login.description: Sign in to your BigMCP account to access your MCP servers, credentials and compositions.

notFound.title: 404 — Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

docs.description: BigMCP documentation: install, connect MCP servers, configure clients and orchestrate compositions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — BigMCP
privacy.description: BigMCP Privacy Policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data.

terms.title: Terms of Service — BigMCP
terms.description: BigMCP Terms of Service. Read our terms and conditions for using the platform.
